title: test/CAPI/ir.c failing with assertions enabled
body:
I see this when running tests:

```
$ build/bin/circt-capi-ir-test
@registration
0
@rtltypes
error: invalid element for rtl.inout type
Assertion failed: (succeeded(ConcreteT::verify(getDefaultDiagnosticEmitFn(ctx), args...))), function get, file ../llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/StorageUniquerSupport.h, line 97.
zsh: abort      /Users/chrisl/Projects/circt/build/bin/circt-capi-ir-test
```

It isn't obvious to me what is going on here though.  The element type looks like an integer type.  Perhaps things aren't getting registered correctly?
